query:
SELECT 
  lu.lineUserId,
  lu.displayName,
  lu.referralCode,
  lu.createdAt,
  lu.followedAt,
  lu.userId,
  u.name as userName,
  u.email as userEmail,
  u.createdAt as userCreatedAt
FROM line_users lu
LEFT JOIN users u ON lu.userId = u.id
ORDER BY lu.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
